title: SSRF Defense, Prototype-Safe Data, Terminal Injection, Paths, and Resource Limits · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Resource Ceilings
summary: Redirects escape the fixed host, parsed objects are merged into state, remote text contains ANSI or bidi controls, save paths are arbitrary, and response or command sizes are unbounded. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
